DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION BE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION AND FOR SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED. THE MOTION THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $375.00 IS AWARDED AND SHALL BE PAID WITHIN THIRTY DAYS FROM THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Ruth H. Downes, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant ADI SIMAYOF.
Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Angelica Martinez pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CACH, LLC. and against Defendant ADI SIMAYOF as follows:
Principal $24,902.98
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $285.00
Other: Sanctions awarded at Plaintiff's Motion on December 30, 2013 in the amount of $375.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,562.98
Judgment signed in open court.

Mtn For Order That Matters In Req For Admission Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Robert Cohen special appearance for plaintiff Cach LLC. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Be Deemed Admitted. The Defendant's motion and for sanctions is unopposed. The motion that Requests for Admissions be Deemed Admitted is granted. Sanctions in the sum of $375.00 is awarded and shall be paid within thirty days from the date of service of this Order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
